caption: A group of people wearing aprons and gloves are gathered around a table, preparing kimchi with salted napa cabbage and red chili paste.
A person wearing black gloves is holding a piece of seasoned napa cabbage over a bowl filled with kimchi, surrounded by a jar of kimchi on a wooden table.
A group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok are waving South Korean flags, standing in front of a brick building.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional and modern attire, with some holding documents and others wearing goggles, standing in front of the South Korean flag.
A person is seen wearing a vibrant red hanbok adorned with intricate floral patterns, standing indoors near an open door with a view of a traditional Korean house.
A couple dressed in vibrant hanbok is seated before a ritual table adorned with traditional items, engaging in a ceremony under a decorated backdrop.
The image shows a traditional Korean ancestral rite setup with a wooden table adorned with various food offerings such as fruits, pastries, and a teapot, set against a backdrop of calligraphy panels.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean attire is gathered around a ritual table adorned with food offerings, performing deep bows as part of an ancestral rite known as Jesa.
A group of people stands in a line on a paved area, facing a statue and trees in the background, appearing to be engaged in a solemn or respectful activity.
A group of men in suits stand solemnly at a grave site, bowing their heads in respect, with a small South Korean flag and offerings placed on the ground nearby.
A cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame stands illuminated against a dark night sky in an open field.
The image shows a large, ancient stone structure with a cylindrical body and a square top frame, situated in an open field under a clear sky.
A beautifully illuminated traditional Korean palace with upturned eaves and colorful dancheong paintwork stands prominently against a deep blue twilight sky.
The image shows a traditional Korean palace with wooden pavilions featuring upturned eaves and colorful dancheong paintwork, situated on a raised stone platform under a clear blue sky.
A shallow waterway flows through a restored urban stream bordered by stone embankments and surrounded by autumn-colored trees, with modern buildings in the background.
A statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin stands prominently in a plaza surrounded by fountains and trees, with modern buildings in the background.
Two individuals dressed in black are kneeling and bowing deeply with their hands on the floor in front of an altar adorned with flowers and a framed portrait.
A family is gathered in a living room, with two children dressed in traditional Korean hanbok kneeling and bowing deeply, while an adult sits nearby, also dressed in traditional attire.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are gathered in a living room, with some kneeling and bowing deeply, hands on the floor, while others sit or stand nearby.
A group of people stands in front of a statue labeled "세종대왕," which depicts a seated figure in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, symbolizing King Sejong the Great.
The image shows a statue of King Sejong the Great, seated and wearing royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, illuminated at night with Korean text nearby.
A person is flying a colorful kite in an open grassy area under a partly cloudy sky.
A person is flying a colorful kite in an open grassy field under a clear sky.
A group of people is seated on the floor around a colorful floral mat, engaging in a traditional Korean board game called Yutnori.
Two children dressed in colorful traditional Korean attire are sitting on the floor, playing a game involving wooden sticks and a game board with circular stations.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean attire perform a circular dance on a wooden platform with a bridge and flags in the background.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing a circular dance on a stage under a full moon.
A performer dressed in traditional Korean attire with a painted mask is standing on a stage, surrounded by musical instruments and spectators.
The image displays a collection of intricately painted wooden masks with various expressions, hanging on a grid display.
A bowl of ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth is served with chopsticks on a wooden table.
A pot of ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth is placed next to a container of kimchi on a white surface.
The image shows a box containing neatly arranged gimbap, featuring cylindrical rolls of rice with colorful fillings such as cucumber, carrots, and sesame seeds, all wrapped in dark-green seaweed.
The image shows a plate of small, round, golden-brown patties coated with an egg batter, resembling Korean pan-fried meatballs.
The image displays an assortment of colorful, square-shaped confections with decorative pieces and pressed patterns, resembling traditional Korean hangwa.
A box contains neatly arranged rectangular pastries coated in various colored toppings, including pink, black, and beige, with some pieces featuring a central flower decoration.
A bowl of yaksik, a Korean sweet rice dish, is presented on a checkered cloth atop a green placemat, accompanied by a blurred background featuring a cup and a bottle.
The image shows small, square, golden-brown pastries with a glossy glaze and decorative flower-shaped garnishes on a plate.
The image shows a dish featuring thinly sliced beef and vegetables in a pan, likely being cooked or served as part of a meal.
A bowl of soup contains white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red pepper strips, and a sprinkle of brown seasoning.
A bowl of soup contains white oval sliced rice cakes and crescent-shaped dumplings, garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.
A plate of japchae, featuring translucent brown noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables and topped with sesame seeds.
The image shows a traditional Korean building with a tiled roof and colorful decorations, situated on a stone platform under a clear blue sky.
The image shows traditional Korean architecture with curved tiled roofs and wooden structures, surrounded by greenery under a clear sky.
The image shows a traditional Korean gate with an arched stone gateway topped by a wooden pavilion, flanked by curved fortress walls and adorned with red flags.

The image shows a modern bridge structure with cables and a distant view of a tall white observation tower with a disc-shaped deck and pointed spire, set against a backdrop of green hills under an overcast sky.

A group of soldiers is gathered around military vehicles in a rural setting, with one individual standing near a small tree and others seated on a truck bed, suggesting a moment of rest or discussion during a military operation.
The image depicts a desolate urban area with dilapidated buildings and power lines, suggesting a post-war or war-torn setting.

The image depicts a rural village scene with traditional thatched-roof houses and people gathered near a stone wall along a body of water, set against a backdrop of rolling hills and sparse vegetation.
A family is playing jegichagi, a traditional Korean game involving kicking a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock with their feet, in a park surrounded by blooming trees.
A child is wearing traditional Korean attire and kicking a small blue shuttlecock in mid-air.
